title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan's approach to using Claude Code, extracting four strategies: role assignment, parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before implementation. Tan reportedly shipped 600,000 lines of code in 60 days using this method while managing the startup accelerator.
